description: A new player successfully registers an account (first-time sign up)
Player joins the waitlist queue using a passcode (server-side)
Player joins the waitlist queue using a QR token (server-side)
Returning player rejoins the waitlist queue without passcode (server-side)
Player voluntarily leaves the waitlist queue (server-side)
Admin forms a team from the top players in the queue (server-side)
Admin starts a game between two staged teams (server-side)
Admin declares a winner, completing the game (server-side)
Admin marks a player as absent from the session (server-side)
Admin marks a player as left mid-session (server-side)
Player or admin marks an absent player as present (server-side)
Admin manually adds a player to the waitlist queue (server-side)
Admin reorders the waitlist queue priorities (server-side)
Admin keeps the winning team with optional player substitutions (server-side)
Admin manually triggers the next game via the orchestrator (server-side)
Admin generates a QR join token for the waitlist (server-side)
Admin updates waitlist settings like max_wins or game_duration (server-side)
Admin changes a team's color (server-side)
Admin promotes or demotes a user's role (server-side)
User anonymizes their account and deletes Clerk identity (server-side)
Admin creates a new game session waitlist (client-side)
Player updates their profile information (client-side)
Player logs out of the app (client-side)
User signs in via Clerk (client-side)
User resets their password via Clerk (client-side)
User creates a Clerk account to link to existing guest profile (client-side)
Guest user links their profile to a Clerk account (client-side)
